title: Control environment
text: The entity shall demonstrate commitment to integrity and ethical values as part of the control environment supporting trust services criteria.

title: Board oversight
text: The board of directors shall exercise oversight of internal control, including cybersecurity and information security risk governance.

title: Risk identification and analysis
text: Management shall identify, assess, and analyze risks that could impact achievement of security, availability, and confidentiality objectives.

title: Control activities
text: Control activities shall be selected and developed to mitigate risks to acceptable levels, including IT and process-level controls.

title: Logical access
text: Logical access security software, infrastructure, and architectures shall be implemented to protect information assets against unauthorized access.

title: System monitoring
text: The entity shall monitor system components and operations to detect anomalies, security events, and control failures promptly.

title: Availability commitments
text: The entity shall establish and maintain commitments for system availability, including capacity planning, incident handling, and recovery.

title: Confidentiality commitments
text: Information designated as confidential shall be protected through policies, contractual commitments, encryption, and access restrictions.
